item.title: The 2026-2027 Season of Events - 05/01/2026 12:00am EDT to 09/08/2026 11:59pm EDT
item.description: Location : 30 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Here it is, folks! There are still a couple of [...]
item.dc:creator: The Ritz Theatre
item.yodel:media_alt_text: The 2026-2027 Season of Events on May 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include season of events and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.title: Taste of Summer Seneca County 2026 - 06/21/2026 12:00am EDT to 06/28/2026 11:59pm EDT
item.description: Location : 79 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Save the dates for Taste of Summer Seneca County 2026! Get ready to celebrate the flavors of the season with Taste of Summer Seneca County, returning June 21 to 28, 2026! This weeklong culinary event invites locals and visitors to explore limited-time, summer-inspired specials from restaurants, cafés, bakeries, bars, food trucks, and more across the county. From refreshing drinks to seasonal dishes and sweet treats, Taste of Summer highlights the delicious diversity of Seneca County’s food scene while encouraging guests to visit new places and support local businesses. The more locations your support, the more prizes you'll win! Details on prized and locations coming soon, stay tuned!
item.dc:creator: JAM's Monthly Markets
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Taste of Summer Seneca County 2026 on Jun 21, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include food scene and local businesses.

item.title: The World's Largest Swimming Lesson - 06/25/2026 10:15am EDT to 06/25/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description:
Location : 180 Summit St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA

Drowning is fast, silent, and preventable. Join us at the Tiffin Community YMCA on June 25th for the World's Largest Swimming Lesson. We're building water competency and confidence, one lesson at at time. Register now! A free 30 minute swim lesson- three sessions to choose from. Secure your spot today!
item.dc:creator: YMCA of Bucyrus-Tiffin, Inc
item.yodel:media_alt_text: The World's Largest Swimming Lesson on Jun 25, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include free and pool.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 06/25/2026 1:00pm EDT to 06/25/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 70 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Simply Susan's
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jun 25, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin and tiffin's wild goose chase.

item.title: Teen Art Club - 06/25/2026 2:00pm EDT to 06/25/2026 3:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join the Teen Art Club at the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library on Thursdays, June 11 and 25, from 2:00 to 3:30 p.m. in the Junior Home Room. This event invites teens in grades 6 through 12 to unleash their creativity alongside fellow art enthusiasts. Participants can bring their own drawings and projects or explore new ones, as the Library provides various craft supplies and guidance on arts and crafts skills. This program is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program “Unearth a Story.” For more details, visit http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/ or call 419-447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Teen Art Club on Jun 25, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include craft supplies and creativity.

item.title: Revolutionary War Veterans of Seneca County - 06/25/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/25/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join Tiffin-Seneca Public Library on Thursday, June 25 at 6:00 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room for the program "Revolutionary War Veterans of Seneca County." Led by Local History and Genealogy Specialist Jessica Hoehn, this engaging presentation explores the stories of Revolutionary War veterans who settled in Seneca County, highlighting their service, journeys, and lasting impacts on the local community. This free program is open to all adults and is part of T-SPL’s America 250 celebration. For more information, call (419) 447-3751 or visit http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Revolutionary War Veterans of Seneca County on Jun 25, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include genealogy specialist and local history.

item.title: Seneca Proud Book Club - 06/25/2026 6:30pm EDT to 06/25/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 137 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Book club is open to everyone, even if you haven't finished reading the book yet. Books are available at Pan Yan Bookstore in downtown Tiffin and also through the public library.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Proud
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Seneca Proud Book Club on Jun 25, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Clubs and book club.

item.title: Thursday Night Tunes (TNT) - 06/25/2026 7:00pm EDT to 06/25/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 155 E Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA This is our concert series, free to the public. Come out and have your ears blessed, and put a smile on that face on Thursdays! Can't wait to see you!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Park & Recreation
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Thursday Night Tunes (TNT) on Jun 25, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Parks & Rec and community involvement.

item.dc:creator: Tiffin Parks & Recreation
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Thursday Night Tunes (TNT) on Jun 25, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Music & Entertainment and Parks & Rec.

item.title: LIFEGUARDING - 06/26/2026 12:00am EDT to 06/28/2026 11:59pm EDT
item.description:
Location : 180 Summit St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA

Ready to make a difference this summer? 🌊☀️

Become a certified lifeguard and gain the skills to save lives, build confidence, and become a leader!

Important Details:

JUNE 26-28, 2026

Friday 4p-8p, Saturday 8a-5p, & Sunday 8a-5p

• Blended course format – 7 hours of online coursework must be completed before the first day of class

• Swim assessment required one week prior to the first class- Friday at 6pm

• Attendance is mandatory for all scheduled days (no make-up sessions)

• Registration closes one week before the class begins

• Limited to just 8 students per class – reserve your spot early!

Don’t wait—spots fill fast! 📅 Enroll now at the Tiffin Community YMCA and dive into a new opportunity!
item.dc:creator: YMCA of Bucyrus-Tiffin, Inc
item.yodel:media_alt_text: LIFEGUARDING on Jun 26, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. This is an all-day event with themes including job and lifeguard.

item.title: St. Joseph Festival General Store - 06/26/2026 9:00am EDT to 06/27/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 36 Melmore St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA June 26 | 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM June 27 | 9:00 AM – 3:00 PM St. Joseph Activity Center, 36 Melmore St., Tiffin, OH Get ready to shop 'til you drop! Join us for the St. Joseph Festival General Store — a two-day event packed with treasures, treats, and great finds! Browse a huge selection of household items, decor, books, toys, and more. You never know what hidden gems you'll discover! All proceeds help support St. Joseph Parish and the St. Joseph Festival. Come early for the best selection — and don’t forget to bring a friend. We can’t wait to see you there!
item.dc:creator: St. Joseph Catholic Church
item.yodel:media_alt_text: St. Joseph Festival General Store on Jun 26, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include st joseph festival and st. joseph festival general store.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 06/26/2026 1:00pm EDT to 06/26/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Shop Tiffin Ohio
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jun 26, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include interactive experience and seasonal.

item.title: No Eileen - 06/26/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/26/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 1146 OH-53, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Dust off your dance moves and join us for a night of music and fun!
item.dc:creator: The Tiffin Moose - Lodge 846
item.yodel:media_alt_text: No Eileen on Jun 26, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include fun and music.

item.title: Cheese Painting Workshop - 06/26/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/26/2026 7:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 89 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Choose Your Board: Standard Bamboo Board – $55 per person Granite/Marble Board – $70 per person All materials provided No experience necessary Enjoy sample charcuterie-style grazing while you create Perfect for a girls' night out, date night, or a fun evening with friends
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Community Kitchen
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Cheese Painting Workshop on Jun 26, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and cheese painting workshop.

item.title: Sins of a Madman with special guest GripShifter - 06/26/2026 7:30pm EDT to 06/26/2026 8:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 30 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for "Sins of a Madman," a tribute to the legendary Ozzy Osbourne, featuring special guest GripShifter on Friday, June 26, 2026, at 7:30 PM. This exciting event will celebrate Ozzy's music and influence with an unforgettable performance that encapsulates the spirit of his work. Don’t miss this opportunity to experience a night dedicated to the essence of rock and its undeniable impact!
item.dc:creator: The Ritz Theatre
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Sins of a Madman with special guest GripShifter on Jun 26, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include ritz theatre and rock music.

item.title: Bug Out at the Tiffin-Seneca Farmers Market! - 06/27/2026 9:00am EDT to 06/27/2026 10:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 195 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for the Bug Out event at the Tiffin-Seneca Farmers Market on Saturday, June 27, 2026, from 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM! Hosted by the Seneca County Master Gardener Volunteers, this fun and educational day will feature kids activities with prizes, a Pollinator & Insect Scavenger Hunt, and hands-on learning about beneficial insects. Families can discover how insects contribute to thriving gardens while enjoying shopping from local vendors offering fresh produce, baked goods, and flowers. Come celebrate the incredible world of pollinators with us!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Seneca Farmers Market
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Bug Out at the Tiffin-Seneca Farmers Market! on Jun 27, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin seneca farmers market and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: Bug Out at the Tiffin-Seneca Farmers Market! - 06/27/2026 9:00am EDT to 06/27/2026 10:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 195 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for the Bug Out event at the Tiffin-Seneca Farmers Market on Saturday, June 27, 2026, from 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM! Hosted by the Seneca County Master Gardener Volunteers, this fun and educational day will feature kids activities with prizes, a Pollinator & Insect Scavenger Hunt, and hands-on learning about beneficial insects. Families can discover how insects contribute to thriving gardens while enjoying shopping from local vendors offering fresh produce, baked goods, and flowers. Come celebrate the incredible world of pollinators with us!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Seneca Farmers Market
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Bug Out at the Tiffin-Seneca Farmers Market! on Jun 27, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and bug out at the tiffin-seneca farmers market.

item.title: Downtown Tiffin Clean Up ~ June 2026 - 06/27/2026 9:00am EDT to 06/27/2026 10:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 96 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for a Downtown Tiffin Clean-Up on Saturday, June 27, 2026, from 9:00–10:30 AM! We’ll meet at Cherry Alley, and we’ll have everything you need (trash bags, brooms, dust-pans, and gloves). Who can volunteer? Everyone! Come on your own, bring a friend, or build a group and join "Bunky’s Litter League", a community-wide initiative focused on litter cleanup and beautification. Teams can include: Businesses Neighborhood groups Faith-based organizations Civic and service groups Clubs Families, individuals, and more... Volunteers are what make this event possible. Your help keeps downtown clean, welcoming, and vibrant. Please register to volunteer by clicking the “Ticket” tab. Save the dates (more clean-ups!) September 12, 2026 November 21, 2026 (Leaf Clean-Up)
item.dc:creator: Downtown Tiffin
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Downtown Tiffin Clean Up ~ June 2026 on Jun 27, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include downtown tiffin clean up ~ june 2026 and families.

item.title: Simply Susan’s Strawberry Saturdays! - 06/27/2026 9:00am EDT to 06/27/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 70 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Chocolate covered strawberry cups are returning! $5 each until sold old! Come see us every Saturday during the farmers market! 70 s Washington. St Tiffin Ohio 44883
item.dc:creator: Simply Susan's
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Simply Susan’s Strawberry Saturdays! on Jun 27, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include returning and saturdays.

item.title: BREAKFAST & PIEROGI @ JAM’s Markets Saturdays 9a-1p - 06/27/2026 9:00am EDT to 06/27/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 144 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us every Saturday from 9 AM to 1 PM at JAM’s Markets, located at 145 Madison St, Tiffin, Ohio 44883, for a delightful morning of breakfast, featuring pierogi and more, while supplies last. Additionally, don’t miss our special Vintage Glass Showcase event—follow us for full details!
item.dc:creator: JAM's Monthly Markets
item.yodel:media_alt_text: BREAKFAST & PIEROGI @ JAM’s Markets Saturdays 9a-1p on Jun 27, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include vintage glass and Food & Drink.

item.description: Location : 186 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.

item.title: Exploring Ice Age Ohio: Unearthing the Story of Mastodons, Mammoths, and other Ice Age Beasts - 06/27/2026 2:00pm EDT to 06/27/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library on Saturday, June 27, at 2:00 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room for "Exploring Ice Age Ohio: Unearthing the Story of Mastodons, Mammoths, and other Ice Age Beasts," part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program “Unearth a Story.” Led by Dr. Peg Yacobucci from Bowling Green State University, this event will transport participants back over 10,000 years to uncover Ohio's Pleistocene landscapes and its iconic wildlife, including woolly mammoths, mastodons, and giant beavers. Attendees will also have the unique opportunity to view and handle actual mammoth and mastodon fossils from northwest Ohio. For more information, call (419) 447-3751 or visit http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Exploring Ice Age Ohio: Unearthing the Story of Mastodons, Mammoths, and other Ice Age Beasts on Jun 27, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include seasonal and summer reading program.

item.title: Mixer & Mingle Night - 06/27/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/27/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 89 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Hey folx! Looking to expand your circle and meet new people in the area? Seneca Proud and Common Ground are teaming up to co-host a relaxed social mixer for the LGBTQ+ adult community! This isn't a high-pressure dating event. It’s an open, relaxed space dedicated entirely to building local friendships and strengthening community bonds. Whether you’re single, partnered, new to town, or just ready to chat with great people, there is a spot at the table for you! Details: Date: Saturday, June 27, 2026 Time: 6:00 PM Location: The Tiffin Community Kitchen Cost: $25 per person (Covers a great spread of appetizers and drinks!) Who: LGBTQ+ adults (singles, couples, and everyone in between!)
item.dc:creator: Seneca Proud
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Mixer & Mingle Night on Jun 27, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Clubs and community bonds.
